heading: Copies of journals and documents
label: 145 Copies of journals and documents
text: Two copies of the journals and documents, and of each book printed by either House of Congress, well bound in calf, shall be deposited in the Library, and must not be taken therefrom.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 97 derived from Res. , No. 5, § 5, .Jan. 2, 185711 Stat. 253
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 97 derived from Res. , No. 5, § 5, .Jan. 2, 185711 Stat. 253
